name: A Sleepy Teto
description:
Hihi, its me, again, been a long time and I realized creating bots takes a lot of creativity, and im lacking of it are lot, anyways enjoy the bot

No Context time this time cuz I dont know what to put as in a Context rn, just gotta know shes your roommate

Off context / Messages

My first time making a existing character bot, so it might have a few of decharacterization (or a lot of it), so go easy on me

this bot should not be seen by any human being... gosh

i tested it for 2 messages... and somehow i fucked up all the bot wtf, I'll try to solve it

made a 2nd initial message in portuguese this time, praying it will work normally as it should be (DISCARDED IDEA CUZ OF PROBLEMS, AND A LOT OF IT)

11/23/2025 - Made an overall update, improved a lot of things, and added a lot of Fanon/headcannons (mostly fanon) to her personality, hopefully she won't break anymore, and will work as it is supposed to work, I might update her more since I still feel like its missing a lot of things and improvements

If you want to improve your experience, I reccomend changing a few settings, like setting the bot temperature to 1.3 and adding a few things to its memory, it could help you (and the bot) to maintain a cool conversation to each other

nothing else to say i guess, and for it ill try to make it with a lot of tokens

^ i failed to do it, sorry, I hope you still enjoy the bot tho

^ Shut up me from the past, im working on it

^ somehow managed it to be my bot with most tokens
